_comment: Rocky Linux 9 GenericCloud -- the dnf FAMILY with a RECIPE-PINNED repo (Rocky's mirrorlist sprawls across mirrors the allowlist can't enumerate, so pin to dl.rockylinux.org). OPERATOR must PIN upstream_sha256 (build fails closed) and add dl.rockylinux.org to fleet mirror_allowlist. $releasever/$basearch are cloud-init/dnf vars (kept literal).
repo_content:
[baseos-drvps]
name=Rocky $releasever BaseOS (drvps pinned)
baseurl=https://dl.rockylinux.org/pub/rocky/$releasever/BaseOS/$basearch/os/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-Rocky-9
[appstream-drvps]
name=Rocky $releasever AppStream (drvps pinned)
baseurl=https://dl.rockylinux.org/pub/rocky/$releasever/AppStream/$basearch/os/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-Rocky-9
